base_candidates_ranked.reason: The in vitro samples were acquired using data-dependent acquisition (DDA) on Lumos and Q Exactive instruments with label-free quantification (LFQ) implied by the use of MaxQuant and intensity-based site identification.
The cellular ubiquitinomics samples were explicitly acquired in data-independent acquisition (DIA) mode on an Orbitrap Astral and processed with DIA-NN.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: Multiple mentions of 'GlyGly (K)' variable modifications, 'K-ε-GG Remnant Magnetic Immunoaffinity Beads', and 'di-glycine remnant profiling' for both in vitro and cellular samples.
